data.title: 国际服官方四格100话纪念
data.summary: [Official 4-Panel Manga] Ep. 100 Special! It's a very special 100th episode brought to you by @donmi
data.body:
[Official 4-Panel Manga] Ep. 100 Special!
It's a very special 100th episode brought to you by 
@donmin_h
!

Thanks to your fervent support, we've released 100 episodes of the Blue Archive Official 4-Panel Manga!

#BlueArchive #BlueArchive4PanelManga
